feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI...
entry.content:
I am also trying to capture the below SAP GUI screen.

  

After screen capture it is not showing full parts of the screen. Because of it not able to access User Input field and Password Input field.

Please suggest how to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Siddhant

entry.title: Build Process Automation and Work Zone Connection different subaccounts?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we have been using SAP Build Process Automation  for a year to automate our processes. In the future we want to use the workflow capability of BPA. That's the reason why we want to connect Build Process Automation with Build Work Zone, standard edition. Is it necessary that both applications are located in the same subaccount in the BTP or can they have different subaccounts?

Kind regards,

Theresa

entry.title: Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached : Error in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have SAP Build Process automation with Free Tier. I have created a basic job for extracting details from PDF and returning the raw information. When I run/ test the automation separately I can see the results. But when I deploy it and trigger the Process I am getting "Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached" error in the Monitoring tab.

I have attached images for reference

Tagging experts

@Archana 
@Chaitanya_Priya

entry.title: Build Process Automation subscription is failing again!
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems the problem with subscription to Build Process Automation is back.  I am getting it today. 

I checked the role collections assigned to my trial account user and none of them are appearing in my assigned roles.

I am following 

 Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Tutorials

Best Regards

entry.title: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP Build Process
entry.content:
Hi,

We have an existing custom classic workflow for purchase order where the approval is based on multiple cost centers of line items. It uses dynamic parallel processing using multiline element and a subworkflow.

We want the same feature implemented using SAP Build Process. Would appreciate if any guidance or blog post is available.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Unable to Activate Event Mesh Webhook Subscription
entry.content:
Good day SAP community,

I created a webhook on the 4th of June, last week Tuesday, however the status remains inactive with subscription Paused. I attempted refresh, clicked resume, however, it has been on Paused.

Has anyone experienced this before and solved this? Any solution to this because I recreated the webhook and still having same issue.
I look forward to all suggestions. Thank you

entry.title: How to keep desktop agent session alive with unattended mode in RDP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to keep desktop agent session alive always with unattended mode in RDP, after few hours if desktop agent is not in use it is getting disconnected in the RDP.

Could you please help me how I can keep the desktop Agent session alive always with unattended mode.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to keep desktop agent session alive with unattended mode in RDP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to keep desktop agent session alive always with unattended mode in RDP, after few hours if desktop agent is not in use it is getting disconnected in the RDP.

Could you please help me how I can keep the desktop Agent session alive always with unattended mode.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Download Desktop Agent 3 hanging
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using a trial account in US10 region.  The first step of the exercise for downloading agent 3 just hangs. 

I have already assigned three roles ProcessAutomationDeveloper, ProcessAutomationAdmin and ProcessAutomationParticipant to my user.  The following screen print is showing what I am facing (the tree circles)  

Best Regards

entry.title: Old Instances Persisting in SAP Build Process Visibility Scenario After Redeployment
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently, I encountered a backend issue in my workflow within SAP Build Process Automation, which caused many instances to crash. After resolving the problem and redeploying the process, the old instances are still visible in the process visibility scenario, rendering it ineffective.

I've tried several solutions, including:

  • Deleting all "older" released versions of the process
  • Redeploying the process visibility scenario
  • Clearing the processed data in the monitoring settings of the SAP Build lobby

Despite these efforts, the old instances always reappear after processing new data. They are no longer visible in the monitoring of the process/workflow itself, yet they persist in the visibility scenario.

Does anyone have any hints on how to fix this?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Monitor subpages keep loading
entry.content:
Hello,

Following up this post: SAP Build Process Automation Monitor subpages keep loading (content can't be reached), I have same issue. Sub-pages are not loading.

Especially:

  • Control Tower > Agents
  • Control Tower > Agent Groups...
  • or Control Tower > Environments > [My env] > Agent Management

The old post seems to affect an old version, I'm in the latest version.

I'm following the IA enablement training:

  • Intelligent Automation Enablement (in Success Map)
  • https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-agent.html 

So I'm not really familiar with it.

I have tried all the suggested workaround: incognito window, checking.enabling cookies, log in/log out...

I also tried to log in from SAP BTP cockpit via "Instances and Subscriptions".

Does anyone have any other advise/suggestions?

Thanks,

Yves

entry.title: Unable to consume RAP web api in SAP Build App and Action
entry.content:
Hi Team,

  I have build a RAP Web API. But unable to consume in SAP Build Apps. Throwing error mentioned in screenshots. Can you please help.

SAP Build Apps errors.

 

SAP Build Apps -  Action errors

 

Thanks,

Anjan Paul

entry.title: Automation in SAP Public Cloud 2402
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
Is automation possible in the SAP Public Cloud 2402?
If yes, I have a requirement to Automate the change in the material valuation class. It will include the following steps in sequence:
Step 1:
Reverse the open GR of the listed materials with the plant.
Step 2:
Delete the Open PO line items of the listed materials with the plant.
Step 3:
Clear the stock manually/inventory
Step 4:
Change the valuation class of listed materials with the plant.
Please let me know how can we achieve this.
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: "Uncaught TypeError" during "EnrichFinance" Step in "Business Partner Creation Approval Process"
entry.content:
We have imported and testing "Business Partner Creation Approval Process" live process project from SAP Build Process Automation Store.

We are able to reach until "EnrichFinance" step without any issues.

But on "EnrichFinance" step, when we're trying to add Bank or Tax Data in My Inbox task, nothing happens.

There are no calls being made to any URL.

But in Console, we see errors when we are clicking on "+" button

For Bank Data -

For Tax Data -

Upon navigation to the referenced Component-preload.js, we see below line of code in failed state -

onAddTaxNumber: function() {
                        var e = this.getParentModel().getProperty("/BPRequest/FinanceData/TaxData");
                        e.push({
                            TaxCategory: "",
                            TaxNumber: ""
                        });
                        this.getParentModel().setProperty("/BPRequest/FinanceData/TaxData", e);
                        this.getParentModel().refresh()
                    },

Trigger to the process -

We are triggering process via API. Below is our payload -

{
  "RequestId": "1718213572",
  "BPRequest": {
    "BusinessPartnerCategory": "2",
    "BusinessPartnerName": "Bhupesh LLC",
    "RolesData": [
      {
        "BusinessPartnerRole": "Z001"
      }
    ],
    "AddressData": {
      "Country": "IN",
      "PostalCode": "400101",
      "CityName": "Mumbai"
    }
  },
  "RequesterDetails": {
    "RequesterUserId": "P000001",
    "RequesterFirstName": "Bhupesh",
    "RequesterLastName": "Yadav",
    "RequesterEmail": "<hidden>"
  },
  "internal": {
    "isRework": false
  }
}

 Please let us know if we are missing anything.

entry.title: Create Context Attributes in Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a process that I want to add to visibility scenario.

I managed to create the visibility scenario itself,

But in the process I don't see the tab where I suppose to create the context attributes.

Do I need a specific role for that? Is it depend on a version or specific process?

Thanks

 

#Visibility Scenario

entry.title: SAP IAS User group patch action is not working from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using the Identity directory API for the Patch action of the group. I have created the user using IAS action, wanted to move the user to specific Group. From Business accelerator Hub I am able to move the user to desired group, but from action group it is giving me error 400.

I am following the below steps:

  1. Login to SAP Build Process lobby, navigate to action section.
  2. Add the Identity provider API Action Project.
  3. Add the Group Patch Action to the project
  4. And execute the Patch action with provided input as Group Id 
  5. And operation as "xxxxx", path as "xxxxx" and value as "xxxxx"

    Attached screenshot for your reference:

     

    ERROR: 

Could you please help me or any suggestion to resolve this issue?

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to create the dynamic flow for approvers in process automation
entry.content:
Hi 

Need to know how to make a approver flow dynamic in process automation i.e there can n number of approvers for ex: In order 1 there will be L1 and L2 approver so process will go first to L1 then L2, next in order 2 there can be L1, L2,L3.....n 

We are starting the process with API in that there will be sending the Approver Levels So how can make this dynamic .

entry.title: Call external API from custom action in SAP Fiori Element
entry.content:
Hi,

I've developed a SAP Fiori Elements List report application. I need to call an external API when the user select a row in the list. I've defined a custom action but I don't know how to call external API

The API is the url for trigger a SAP Build Process Automation flow. So the requirement is trigger process automation flow when the user select a row in the list

Anybody can help me?

Thank you.

Piervincenzo.

entry.title: Destination for Live Process Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

I struggle to get the Destination for SAP Build Process Automation Live Projects Working, described here https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-destination-for-live-process-projects?locale=en-US.

The destination looks like this:

When I check the connection it returns "Connection to "WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized" ", so I assume that the URL is correct and its a matter of the user.

The User, used for the destination,  is available in the Subaccount and as a space member with role "Space Developer"

Could you please help me what is missing? Many thanks!

entry.title: SAP Intelligent RPA browser extension with Debugger active
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to install SAP Desktop agent and SAP RPA browser extension on client machine, we realized that this SAP RPA browser extension has the Debugger functionality enabled  and client had raised questions around this.

1.Can this Debugger functionality can be removed from this browser extension ?

2.if not, Can SAP elaborate on why the debugger functionality cannot be removed.?

3.What is the debugger permission used for? 

Thanks,

Kumar
